name: script-generator
description: Generates production-ready ChromaScape scripts from natural language OSRS task descriptions

agentSpawn.command: find ChromaScape/src/main/java -name '*.java' | sort && echo '---SCRIPTGEN---' && find scriptgen/src/main/java -name '*.java' 2>/dev/null | sort
agentSpawn.description: Index all ChromaScape and scriptgen Java classes
